name: Black Forest Cheesecake Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. Combine cream cheese and sugar in a bowl. Mix on medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in chocolate and extract.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 45 minutes.
7. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan. Cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill.
8. Top the cheesecake with pie filling and whipped topping just before serving.
